commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2794d5788a33ae19aed5aab5740720ffe506bdfa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a restart-handoff-gated health probe before the running-gateway restart prompt, changes that prompt's default from Yes to No, and adds focused Vitest coverage.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +70. Total +85 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main reaches the running-service restart prompt when `healthOk` is false and the service runtime is `running`. I did not run a live macOS LaunchAgent reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer-reviewed code update for the normal doctor path; automation cannot supply the contributor's live supervisor proof.

target.title: fix(doctor): skip restart prompt when gateway is healthy after recent restart
target.body:
## Summary
- `openclaw doctor` unconditionally prompted "Restart gateway service now?" with default=Yes whenever the gateway was running, even if it had just restarted via SIGUSR1 after an update
- This caused restart loops on macOS where the prompt raced with `launchctl KeepAlive`
- Added a health probe before the restart prompt when a restart handoff exists (`--deep` mode). If the gateway is healthy, skip the prompt entirely
- Changed `initialValue` from `true` to `false` as a safety net so users don't accidentally confirm a restart by pressing Enter
- Added 2 new tests + updated an existing test assertion

Fixes #86518

## Test plan
- `npx vitest run src/commands/doctor-gateway-daemon-flow.test.ts` — 18/18 passing
- Test: skips restart prompt when gateway is healthy after recent restart handoff
- Test: prompts for restart when health probe fails despite recent restart handoff

## Real behavior proof
This fix touches the `openclaw doctor` interactive flow which requires a running Gateway service with a LaunchAgent/systemd supervisor and a restart handoff file on disk. CI covers the full unit test coverage (18/18 passing). A live reproduction would require:
1. Running an OpenClaw instance with LaunchAgent or systemd
2. Triggering an update/SIGUSR1 restart (which writes the restart handoff)
3. Running `openclaw doctor` and confirming the restart prompt is skipped when healthy

The code path is fully exercised by the new unit tests with mocked service runtime and health probe.
target.author: liaoyl830
